epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Urgency with or without urge incontinence; bladder diary; exclude infection

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to urology care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Urology evaluation with urodynamics when needed
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Behavioral therapy, antimuscarinics, beta-3 agonists, botulinum toxin or neuromodulation when indicated
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad access to specialist care and medications
